eng.definition: having or showing a feeling of vague or regretful longing.
examples: She had a wistful look on her face as she recalled her childhood.
His wistful gaze at the sunset made me think he was in love.
The music created a wistful mood at the party.

hin.definition: Information, skills, and understanding that you have gained through learning or experience
examples: मैंने उस वर्ग में बहुत ज्ञान प्राप्त किया.
वह अपने विषय में अद्वितीय ज्ञान रखता है.
